creator: FreeBSD@ShaneWare.Biz
text:
Created attachment 230382
maintainer update for graphics/opensubdiv

Update opensubdiv to v3.4.4
remove docs files from plist and use PORTDOCS= *
re-enable TBB options as default
include patch submitted to project to build with onetbb
https://github.com/PixarAnimationStudios/OpenSubdiv/pull/1234/commits/9079a517f406
